summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. Four hydrated open pull requests remain independent non-security maintainer-review items; #78247 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation marked that exact PR as security-sensitive. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is appropriate under this job.

actions.reason: Standalone useful PR; keep open for normal maintainer review rather than closing or grouping under this inventory shard.
Standalone focused bug-fix PR; keep open for ordinary maintainer correctness review.
Standalone QA/test contribution awaiting author or maintainer follow-up; no safe close action is supported by the hydrated artifact.
Standalone useful bug-fix PR; keep open for maintainer review outside this inventory cleanup.
